commit.message:
Fix UNIQUE constraint error when multiple triggers share the same block regex

When two triggers have the same block_regex, the second trigger to fire would
hit a UNIQUE constraint on (domain, type) in Pi-hole's domainlist table and
enter an error loop. Now block rules are looked up by regex pattern instead of
comment, so the second trigger detects the existing rule and adds its groups
to it. On removal, only exclusive groups are removed from shared rules - the
rule is only deleted when no other active trigger references it.

Add nomodeset to ARM64 boot: fix display driver crash on Snapdragon X

The kernel boots fine but a DRM driver takes over from efifb and crashes,
causing black screen and reboot. nomodeset keeps the EFI framebuffer active.
Also simplify GRUB config to use ACPI (proven working) instead of DTB auto-detection.

commit.message:
Migrate to JetEngine + Elementor + JetReviews architecture (v2.0.0)

Replace custom DB tables and React frontend with JetEngine CPT/meta fields,
Elementor templates, and JetReviews for community feedback. This eliminates
the Node.js build pipeline and makes the platform maintainable via WP admin.

- Register csms_tool CPT with custom capabilities
- Programmatic JetEngine meta field registration from framework JSON (156 fields)
- Adapt scoring engine to read/write post meta instead of custom tables
- Add score recomputation on save_post + WP-Cron (15 min interval)
- Retain custom voting system with REST API + vanilla JS
- New shortcodes: [csms_tool_scores], [csms_vote], [csms_score_bar], [csms_methodology]
- Update roles with CPT capabilities (csms_vendor, csms_editor)
- Add one-time migration script from v1.0 custom tables to CPT
- Remove React frontend endpoints and old shortcode
- Simplify CI/CD: remove Node.js build step from GitHub Actions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: corrigir onConflict do upsert para usar constraint existente

O PostgREST requer UNIQUE CONSTRAINT (não apenas UNIQUE INDEX) para
onConflict. Alterado de 'tenant_id,pncp_id' para
'tenant_id,source_id,external_id' que usa a constraint existente
da migração 00002. Corrigido para ambas as fontes (PNCP e Compras.gov).

commit.message:
feat: architecture multi-bot (Bot A/B/C) + shared data hub

3 stratégies en contest sur 500€ chacune (1500€ total) :
- Bot A : Supertrend + MR RSI(2) (existant, refactorisé)
- Bot B : Momentum Rotation (Antonacci) — score 1m×0.4 + 3m×0.4 + 6m×0.2,
          top 4 assets, rebalance hebdo, zero cash drag
- Bot C : Donchian Breakout Turtle System 2 — breakout 55j, exit 20j,
          ATR stop 2×N, crypto only (BTC/ETH/SOL)

Optimisation API :
- data/market_snapshot.py : hub partagé (macro fetché 1 fois pour 3 bots)
- fetch_ohlcv_cache() : pré-fetch 4h + daily pour tous les symboles
- 3× moins d'appels API vs 3 bots indépendants

live/multi_runner.py : orchestrateur principal
- Affiche tableau comparatif du contest à chaque cycle
- Drawdown check par bot (alertes Telegram)
- State séparés : logs/supertrend/ | logs/momentum/ | logs/breakout/

commit.message:
fix: unblock sign-in/sign-out/sign-up + update homepage hero copy

Sign-in & sign-out: proxy.ts CSRF check ran on /api/auth/* before the
public-API passthrough, rejecting NextAuth's form-encoded POSTs with
415. Exempt /api/auth/ from the custom CSRF check (NextAuth has its own
CSRF tokens).

Sign-up: 13 pending Prisma migrations left the DB out of sync — the
Startup.commonAppProfile column (and many tables) didn't exist, causing
a 500 on user creation. Ran `prisma db push` + marked all migrations
as applied.

Homepage: header changed to "Capital, Fully Optimized." (4 words),
description rewritten to be punchier and platform-wide.

Security fixes:
- Replace grep -Eiv with grep -Fiv to prevent command injection
- Remove SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL from collect step env, use boolean flag
- Use curl --data @- to pipe JSON payload via stdin

Code quality improvements:
- Add set -euo pipefail to all multi-line shell blocks
- Fix mutation patterns with immutable spread syntax
- Add retry logic (2 retries, 2s sleep) for AI API calls
- Add warning log when file truncation occurs
- Add env var validation with user-friendly error messages

Refactoring:
- Split requirements.txt into runtime and dev dependencies
- Remove undocumented "MO" fallback key from build_slack_text
- Replace lambda assignment with def for PEP 8 compliance
- Update tests to reflect new behavior

All 63 tests pass.

Stop leaking Sentry auth token to the browser (#9376)

The VITE_APP_ prefix caused buildConfiguration.js to include the
Sentry auth token in public/env-config.js, exposing it to every
client. Renamed to SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN so it remains build-time only.

fix: security hardening, performance optimizations, and dark mode dialog styling

Security:
- Migrate token storage from localStorage to Capacitor Preferences (native)
- Add HTTPS enforcement in production builds
- Add UUID validation on noteId file path operations
- Gate sensitive console.log calls behind import.meta.env.DEV
- Add input length validation on note titles and summaries

Performance:
- Wrap RecordingContext, NotesContext, SettingsContext values with useMemo
- Add stateRef pattern for stable callbacks in RecordingContext
- Lazy load all page routes with React.lazy + Suspense
- Memo MarkdownContent to avoid re-parsing unchanged content
- Extract constant arrays in RecordingUI to avoid per-render allocation
- Fix duplicate setState + liveActivity calls in resumeRecording

UI:
- Fix dark mode styling for IonAlert and IonSelect dialogs
- Add stepped Ionic color variables for proper overlay contrast
- Style destructive/cancel button colors in alerts
- Fix alert input field styling for rename dialog in dark mode
- Handle empty API response in notes list (show empty state, not error)
- Handle empty response body in API request function

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix post-login hang: use getSession() instead of getUser(), add error handling

getUser() makes a network call that was hanging indefinitely, blocking
setLoading(false) and preventing any page from rendering. Switch to
getSession() which reads from cookies locally (no network call).
Middleware already verifies the session server-side.

Also wrap fetchProfile in try/catch so setLoading(false) always fires
even if the users table query fails.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Aggressive pricing for GW live orders + ask limit updates

GW live orders on Polymarket were placing limit BUY at the detected ask
(e.g. 81c), which was stale by the time the order reached the CLOB.
Other bots sniped all cheap asks within seconds. Two consecutive fills
failed (Wellington 19C NO, Ankara 10C NO) — both sat unfilled 30s.

Fix: submit GW live orders at MAX_ASK (91c) instead of detected ask.
CLOB provides price improvement — we pay the actual ask, not our limit.
This sweeps all remaining liquidity up to our max acceptable price.

Changes:
- executor.js: set entry._gwMaxPrice = MAX_ASK for live PM GW orders
- executor.js: fix isMetarOnly -> isMetarGw (undeclared var in bankroll)
- executor.js: shadow paper trade for METAR GW live executions
- platform-adapter.js: use _gwMaxPrice as limit, skip staleness guard
- platform-adapter.js: return detected ask (not limit) for trade record
- config: MIN_ASK 20c, MAX_ASK 91c for both METAR and PWS GW
- lessons.md: document fill failures and research quality rules

commit.message:
implement phase 0-4: full ragdoll physics fighting game skeleton

- 17-joint ConfigurableJoint ragdoll with RagdollBuilder (procedural)
- RagdollController: pending/committed joint state cycle per fighter
- BodyPart: per-joint Hold/Contract/Extend/Relax drive application
- DamageReceiver: collision → EvaluationSystem + ScoreManager events
- TurnManager state machine: PlayerSelect → Simulate → Evaluate loop
- SimulationRunner: fixed-frame physics simulation countdown
- EvaluationSystem: ground-contact win detection, match result
- ScoreManager: weighted impact scoring by body part
- JointSelectionPanel: 17 joint buttons + 4 state buttons + confirm
- HUDController: scores, phase label, countdown, match-over screen
- InputRouter: PC/iOS action map switching + safe area adapter
- OrbitCamera: RMB drag + scroll (macOS), one-finger + pinch (iOS)
- CameraRig: auto-follows midpoint, auto-zooms to keep both fighters in frame
- AIBrain: Easy/Medium/Hard heuristic AI (random/blended/strategy)
- AIHeuristics: IsOffBalance, DirectionToOpponent, GetDominantArm, IsInStrikingRange
- ScriptableObjects: JointStateConfig, RagdollConfig, MatchRules, SoundBank
- Packages/manifest.json: InputSystem, URP, TextMeshPro
- ProjectSettings: gravity (0,-15,0), solver iterations 20/10
